_comment: Lightweight regression suite for staging QA gate. Target: <5min total. Cost: ~$0.30-0.50 per run.

scenarios.name: basic_inference
scenarios.description: Core inference + tool calling works. Fast sanity check.
scenarios.input: What is 7+5? Reply with ONLY the number, nothing else.

scenarios.name: cb5_teamwork_harness
scenarios.description: CB-5: Teamwork harness assigns teamwork RBAC role — non-admin can send messages and respond

scenarios.name: cb5_external_restricted
scenarios.description: CB-5: External harness restricts filesystem — Bash denied for external role

scenarios.name: pm_tools_exist
scenarios.description: PM tools registered and accessible for admin
scenarios.input: Create a test PM project called 'Staging QA Test' with brief 'automated test'. Use the pm_create_project tool.

scenarios.name: pm_admin_gate
scenarios.description: PM tools blocked for non-admin (RBAC deny)
scenarios.input: List all PM projects using pm_list_projects tool.

scenarios.name: cb5_admin_inference_with_harness
scenarios.description: CB-5: Admin harness with default_role=bot_admin — basic tool call works
scenarios.input: What is 100-37? Reply with ONLY the number, nothing else.

scenarios.name: sandbox_pm_blocked
scenarios.input: List all PM projects using pm_list_projects tool.
